site.title: Rastrum
site.description: Open-source biodiversity observation platform built for Latin America. Multi-modal AI species ID, offline-first, indigenous-language ready, GBIF-aligned.

home.hero_subtitle: Rastrum exists to make every living thing identifiable by anyone, anywhere — even without cell signal, even without formal training, even in the languages that field guides forgot.

how_steps.title: Observe
how_steps.description: Capture photos, audio, or video of any species in the field — online or offline.

how_steps.title: Identify
how_steps.description: Our AI pipeline analyzes your evidence using PlantNet, BirdNET, and Claude Vision with regional accuracy.

how_steps.title: Contribute
how_steps.description: Validated observations join a growing open dataset exported to GBIF and CONABIO for real conservation.

why_items.title: Offline-First
why_items.description: Works without cell signal. Regional ML models cached on-device via ONNX + WebAssembly.

why_items.title: Multi-Modal ID
why_items.description: Photo, audio, video, and ecological evidence — tracks, scat, burrows — all in one platform.

why_items.title: Indigenous Languages
why_items.description: Zapoteco, Mixteco, Náhuatl, Maya, Tsotsil/Tseltal. Built with CARE principles and community consent.

why_items.title: LATAM-Focused
why_items.description: Trained on megadiverse Neotropical data, not just North American and European species.

why_items.title: Open Source
why_items.description: AGPL-3.0 server, Apache 2.0 SDKs. Every observation strengthens the commons.

why_items.title: Conservation Pipeline
why_items.description: Direct exports to GBIF, CONABIO, CONANP, and regional herbaria across Latin America.

home.cta_subtitle: Save with GPS, photo and habitat

identify.title: Identify a Species
identify.upload_desc: Take a photo or upload one. We try every available identifier in parallel and show the most confident result.
identify.result_placeholder: Upload a photo to see the identification result here.
identify.phi_offer_title: This photo doesn't look like a plant.
identify.phi_offer_body: Want it identified anyway? Download our on-device AI once (~2.4 GB on Wi-Fi) and from then on identification works offline, forever, and your photos never leave your phone.
identify.phi_skip_hint: You can download the model later from Profile → Edit → AI settings, or just type the species name manually.
identify.result_unknown: Could not identify this photo confidently.
identify.all_failed: All identifiers failed. Check your connection and try a clearer photo.
identify.source_meta_plantnet: PlantNet — free regional plant identification by INRIA
identify.source_meta_claude_haiku: Claude Haiku 4.5 — Anthropic vision LLM, generalist
identify.source_meta_webllm_phi35_vision: Phi-3.5-vision — Microsoft on-device general VLM (low confidence by design)

explore.title: Explore Observations
explore.subtitle: Browse recent species observations from the community.

about.title: About Rastrum
about.description: Rastrum is an open-source biodiversity observation platform that combines computer vision, audio analysis, and expert curation to identify species from photos, videos, audio, and indirect evidence.

footer.description_short: Open-source biodiversity observation for Latin America.

report.description_placeholder: What happened? What did you expect?
report.metadata_label: We'll include this in your report

auth.sign_in_subtitle: We'll email you a magic link. No password needed.
auth.check_inbox_body: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it on this device to continue.
auth.callback_working: Verifying your link. This takes a second.
auth.callback_error: That link didn't work. It may have expired. Request a new one.
auth.guest_notice: Not signed in — your observations will stay on this device until you sign in.
auth.code_sent_body: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Paste it below — or click the magic link in the email.
auth.passkey_unavailable: Passkeys aren't supported on this browser.
auth.invalid_code: That code didn't work. Try again or request a new one.
auth.register_passkey: Register a passkey on this device
auth.anthropic_key_hint: If set, Claude Vision IDs use your key (billed to you). Stored in this browser only — never sent to our server, except per-call to Anthropic. Leave blank to use the platform default if available.
auth.local_ai_hint: Phi-3.5-vision (~4 GB) for offline ID + Llama-3.2-1B (~880 MB) for translations. WebGPU required. Models download once on first use, then run fully on-device.
auth.local_ai_unsupported: Your browser does not support WebGPU — on-device AI is unavailable.
auth.local_ai_opt_in: Allow on-device AI as a fallback when no Claude key is set
auth.local_ai_warning: Phi-3.5-vision is a general AI without taxonomic training. Results are capped at low confidence and never count toward research-grade.
auth.confirm_download_runs_locally: After download, the model runs entirely on this device — your photos never leave the browser.
auth.confirm_download_one_time: You only download once. The model stays cached for next time.
auth.confirm_download_persistent: We'll request persistent storage so the OS doesn't evict it.
auth.confirm_download_cellular: Use Wi-Fi if possible — this is a large download.
auth.confirm_delete_body: This frees disk space. You can re-download anytime — your account isn't affected.
auth.confirm_clear_all_body: Removes both models and frees all related storage. You can re-download from this page later.
auth.birdnet_hint: Cornell Lab's bird-call identifier (~50 MB). Downloads once, then runs entirely on this device — recordings never leave the browser.
auth.birdnet_attribution: Cite Kahl et al. 2021 if you publish using BirdNET results.
auth.birdnet_nc_warning: BirdNET model is licensed CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 — non-commercial use only.
auth.birdnet_weights_url_missing: Weights are not hosted yet — set PUBLIC_BIRDNET_WEIGHTS_URL to enable.
auth.onnx_base_hint: Compact ImageNet classifier (~2.8 MB). Downloads once, then runs entirely on this device — photos never leave the browser.
auth.onnx_base_attribution: Model: TensorFlow Model Garden (Apache-2.0). ImageNet labels are English common names — treat results as hints, not research-grade IDs.
auth.onnx_base_weights_url_missing: Weights are not hosted yet — set PUBLIC_ONNX_BASE_URL to enable.

profile.title: Profile
profile.license_hint: Applies to new observations. See docs for details.
profile.public_profile_hint: Others can view your profile page and public activity.
profile.gamification_hint: Enable badges, streaks, and activity feed. Quality-gated. No leaderboards.
profile.streak_digest_hint: One summary email per week. No push notifications.
profile.not_signed_in: Sign in to view your profile
profile.no_observations_yet: No observations yet. Make your first one to get started.
profile.my_observations_drafts_needs_location: Drafts ({n}) need a location to sync.
profile.my_observations_last_sync_never: Nothing has synced on this device yet.
profile.offline_banner: Offline — saving locally. We'll sync when you're back online.

observe.title: New observation
observe.photo_hint: Tap to take a photo or choose one or more from your gallery
observe.photo_hint_android: If your camera opens an empty folder, take the photo with your camera app and use 'Upload from gallery'.
observe.audio_unsupported: Audio recording isn't supported on this browser.
observe.audio_permission: Microphone access denied. Allow it in your browser settings to record.
observe.audio_pending_id: Audio observations are identified with BirdNET-Lite once you download the model in Profile → Edit → AI settings.
observe.gps_error_permission_denied: Location permission denied. Allow it in your browser settings, or enter coordinates manually below.
observe.gps_error_unavailable: GPS unavailable on this device. Enter coordinates manually below.
observe.gps_error_timeout: GPS is taking longer than expected. Try again, or enter coordinates manually below.
observe.gps_denied_card_body: Your device blocked permission. Ask again or enter coordinates manually.
observe.form_restored_banner: We restored your in-progress observation. Pick up where you left off.
observe.id_again_failed: No new result. Keeping the current one.
observe.notes_placeholder: Behaviour, context, anything the form doesn't capture
observe.saved_offline: Saved on this device. Will sync when you're online.
observe.error_no_photo: At least one photo is required.
observe.translate_unavailable: On-device translation needs the Llama-3.2-1B helpers. Open Profile → Edit → AI settings to download.
observe.auto_narrative_replace_or_append:
There is already a note. Replace it with the generated one?
OK = Replace · Cancel = Append
observe.auto_narrative_unavailable: On-device narrative needs the Llama-3.2-1B helpers. Open Profile → Edit → AI settings to download.
observe.map_picker_hint: Tap or drag the pin to set the spot. The exact point you place is used.
observe.map_picker_unavailable: Map picker isn't available on this browser.
observe.camera_unsupported: In-app camera isn't supported on this browser. Use the file picker instead.
observe.camera_permission: Camera access denied. Allow it in your browser settings, or use the file picker.
observe.video_unsupported: Video recording isn't supported on this browser.
observe.video_permission: Camera/microphone access denied. Allow it in your browser settings to record.
observe.share_unavailable_hint: Save the observation first to share.
observe.share_failed: Could not share — try copying the URL.
observe.draft_saved_offline: Saved as draft. Add a location later to sync.
observe.draft_no_media: Add at least one photo, audio, or video before saving a draft.
observe.photo_dedupe_warn: You uploaded a similar photo on {date}. Continue or replace?

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: On-device biodiversity assistant — runs fully in your browser. You can also attach a photo or audio.
chat.placeholder: Ask anything about species, habitats, or your observations…
chat.empty_state: Ask about a species, habitat, or how to log a tricky observation. You can also attach a photo or audio. Replies stay on this device.
chat.consent_required: On-device chat needs the Llama-3.2-1B model (~880 MB). It downloads once and runs entirely in your browser.
chat.consent_unsupported: Your browser does not support WebGPU — chat is unavailable here.
chat.system_prompt_en: You are a helpful biodiversity assistant for Rastrum. Answer concisely. The user may ask in English or Spanish — reply in whichever language they used.
chat.system_prompt_es: You are a helpful biodiversity assistant for Rastrum. Answer concisely. The user may ask in English or Spanish — reply in whichever language they used.
chat.attach_audio_unsupported: Audio recording isn't supported on this browser.
chat.attach_audio_permission: Microphone access denied. Allow it in your browser settings to record.
chat.cascade_no_match: I couldn't identify this confidently from the cascade.
chat.vision_unavailable_hint: I couldn't identify this confidently and don't have a vision model loaded. Try a clearer/closer shot, or download Phi-3.5-vision in Profile → Edit → AI settings to enable on-device vision chat.
chat.vision_consent_body: On-device vision chat needs the Phi-3.5-vision model. It downloads once (~2.4 GB) and then runs entirely in your browser — your photos never leave the device.
chat.prefilled_from_chat_banner: Pre-filled from chat. Add location and notes to save.

suggestions.label: Follow-up suggestions
suggestions.how_to_distinguish: How do I tell it apart?
suggestions.how_to_distinguish_species: How do I tell {{species}} apart from similar species?

chat.voice_input_unavailable_hint: Voice input isn't available in this browser. Try Chrome on Android or Safari on iOS 14.5+.

onboarding.install_body: Tap the install button at the bottom right to install Rastrum on your phone.
onboarding.install_body_ios: On iOS, tap the Share button, then choose Add to Home Screen.
onboarding.observe_body: Tap Observar to capture or upload a photo. We identify it for you instantly.
onboarding.profile_body: Your observations live in your profile. Sign in syncs them across devices.
onboarding.first_obs_body: Your first observation is in the books. Keep them coming!
onboarding.pipeline_body: Each photo runs through specialized models first. If none is confident enough, an LLM interpreter refines the result. The more models you configure, the more robust your pipeline.
onboarding.configure_subtitle: Enable the models you want in your identification pipeline. Cloud models work immediately; on-device models download once.
onboarding.id_plantnet_desc: Cloud — plants only. Always available, no config needed.
onboarding.id_claude_desc: Cloud — LLM interpreter. Requires your Anthropic API key.
onboarding.id_phi_desc: On-device — general vision. Works offline after download (~4 GB).
onboarding.id_birdnet_desc: On-device — birds by sound. Cornell Lab (~50 MB).
onboarding.id_llama_text_desc: On-device — offline LLM for chat & summaries (~700 MB).
onboarding.id_pmtiles_mx_desc: Mexico basemap zoom 0–10 (~48 MB) for offline /explore/map.
onboarding.id_pmtiles_unavailable: Operator hasn't published an offline map archive yet.
onboarding.summary_body: Cloud models work immediately. On-device models download in the background.
onboarding.install_pwa_body: Install Rastrum on your device for the best offline experience.
onboarding.install_pwa_body_ios: On iOS, tap the Share button, then choose Add to Home Screen.
onboarding.skip_confirm: PlantNet will be your only identifier. You can add more in Profile → Edit anytime.
onboarding.key_format_hint: Looks like a valid Anthropic key
onboarding.key_network: Couldn't reach Anthropic — check your connection
onboarding.key_help_summary: How do I get a key?
onboarding.key_help_anthropic_intro: Anthropic gives every new account free trial credits — enough for hundreds of identifications.
key_help_anthropic_steps: Open console.anthropic.com and sign in (or create an account).
In the left sidebar, click API Keys.
Click Create Key, name it Rastrum, and copy the value starting with sk-ant-.
Paste it above and tap Save.
onboarding.key_help_privacy: Your key stays in this browser's local storage. It's only sent to Anthropic when you identify a photo — never to Rastrum's servers.

welcome.title: Welcome to Rastrum
welcome.body: Rastrum helps you identify and log any species. Quick 30-second tour — skip anytime.

fab.title: Start observing
fab.body: Tap to start observing — anywhere in the app.

quick_id.title: Quick ID
quick_id.body: While on the Observe screen, the same button becomes Quick ID — photo lookup, no save needed.

explore.title: Explore
explore.body: Map, recent observations, your watchlist — all under Explore.

settings.title: Instant identification
settings.body: Add a free PlantNet API key in Settings → Preferences for instant plant identification. Takes about 2 minutes.

privacy.title: Pick your privacy preset
privacy.body: Choose how visible your observations are to other naturalists. You can change this anytime.

onboarding.step_privacy_body: Choose how visible your observations are to other naturalists. You can change this anytime.

pipeline.section_hint: Configure which models run when you identify a species. The cascade tries them in order and picks the most confident result.

id_transparency.plantnet_desc: Specialized plant model. High accuracy for flora.
id_transparency.claude_haiku_desc: Language model. Useful when specialized models aren't confident.
id_transparency.birdnet_desc: Specialized bird model by sound. Cornell Lab.
id_transparency.efficientnet_desc: Offline fallback classifier. Low accuracy, always available.

pwa.ios_hint: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
pwa.discovery_body: Works offline and saves your observations more reliably.
pwa.discovery_firefox_android_step1: Open the menu (⋮) and choose Install to add Rastrum to your home screen.
pwa.discovery_firefox_desktop_title: Desktop Firefox doesn't yet support installing web apps.
pwa.discovery_firefox_desktop_body: You can keep using it here (offline support via service worker still works), or install from Chrome, Edge or Safari for a dedicated app icon.

map.title: Explore map
map.offline_hint: Download a Mexico-wide pmtiles archive (zoom 0–10) so the basemap renders without a network connection. Stored in your browser's Cache storage and reused on every map load.
map.offline_no_cache_hint: You are offline and the Mexico map isn't downloaded yet. Open Profile → Edit → Offline maps to download it next time you have Wi-Fi.
map.offline_url_missing: Offline map URL is not configured — set PUBLIC_PMTILES_MX_URL to enable.
map.offline_confirm_body_p2: After download, the basemap renders entirely from your device — no tile-server requests.
map.offline_confirm_body_p3: You only download once. The archive stays cached for next time.
map.offline_confirm_body_p4: Use Wi-Fi if possible — this is a large download.
map.offline_delete_confirm_title: Delete offline map from this device?
map.offline_delete_confirm_body: This frees disk space. You can re-download anytime.
map.offline_status_using_cache: Using offline map · cached on this device

export.title: Export observations
export.subtitle: Download your observations as Darwin Core CSV for use with GBIF, SNIB, or any biodiversity database.
export.nothing_to_export: Nothing to export yet — make your first observation.
export.gbif_subtitle: Build a DwC-A ZIP (meta.xml + eml.xml + occurrence.txt) ready for upload to a GBIF IPT instance.
export.gbif_footer: Sensitive species coordinates are obscured per the publisher's data policy. Upload the ZIP to your GBIF IPT instance to mint a DOI.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.statement: Making biodiversity knowledge accessible to everyone — from field researchers to curious hikers — so every observation can drive conservation.
vision.problem: Species identification tools are fragmented across platforms, locked behind language barriers, and rarely work offline. Most existing models are trained on data from North America and Europe, leaving megadiverse regions like Latin America critically underserved.
vision.solution: Rastrum unifies photo, audio, and video identification into a single open platform powered by multiple AI models and validated by community experts. Every observation feeds a growing dataset that strengthens regional accuracy and fuels real conservation action.

phases.name: Next Frontier
items: Regional ML models from community data

impact.title: Conservation Impact
items: Contribute verified observations to the GBIF global dataset
Partner with CONABIO, CONANP, and regional herbaria across Latin America
Flag invasive species detection for rapid response

team.title: Open Source
team.description: Rastrum is AGPL-3.0-licensed and community-driven. Every observation, every validation, every line of code strengthens the global biodiversity knowledge commons.

steps.title: Observe
steps.description: Capture photos, audio, or video of any species in the field.

steps.title: Identify
steps.description: Our AI pipeline analyzes your evidence using PlantNet, BirdNET, and Claude Vision.

steps.title: Contribute
steps.description: Validated observations join a growing open dataset for conservation and science.

items.name: Astro
items.description: Fast, modern web framework for static-first delivery

items.name: Supabase
items.description: Open-source backend for database, auth, and storage

items.name: PlantNet
items.description: Specialized AI for plant and fungi identification

items.name: BirdNET
items.description: Neural network for bird and wildlife audio recognition

items.name: Claude Vision
items.description: Advanced multimodal AI for general species identification

social.compose_placeholder: Share what you noticed — markdown supported.
social.delete_confirm: Delete this comment? This can't be undone.
social.empty_comments: No comments yet — be the first to chime in.
social.no_activity: No new activity in the last 30 days.
social.streak_enable_body: Track your daily observation streak. Quality-gated, opt-in, no leaderboards.
social.streak_recompute_failed: Couldn't enable streaks. Try again in a moment.

expert.apply_subtitle: Help validate identifications. Expert IDs are weighted 3× in the consensus.
expert.apply_taxa_hint: Pick the kingdoms/classes you can identify confidently.
expert.apply_credentials_placeholder: Degrees, field experience, publications, taxa specialism…
expert.apply_pending_body: We'll email you once it's reviewed. Meanwhile keep observing — your identifications already help.
expert.apply_already_expert: You're already a recognised expert. Thank you!
expert.apply_unavailable: Expert applications aren't open yet — the schema is being prepared. Track the {0} item in the roadmap.
expert.apply_taxa_required: Select at least one area of expertise.
expert.apply_credentials_required: Tell us a bit about your background.
expert.credentialed_hint: You can read precise coordinates of sensitive species, subject to BC/TK notices.

experts.title: Expert applications
experts.subtitle: Review pending applications. Approving flips users.is_expert and sets expert_taxa.
experts.not_authorized: You don't have access to this admin page.

profile_streak_push.section_hint: Get a single push notification at 8 PM local time when your streak is one day from breaking. Strict opt-in; never multiple notifications per day.
profile_streak_push.permission_blocked: Browser notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser site settings, then try again.
profile_streak_push.unsupported: This browser doesn't support web push (try Chrome on Android or Safari 16.4+ on iOS).
profile_streak_push.vapid_missing: Push isn't configured yet — the operator must publish a VAPID key first.

docs.index_subtitle: Everything you need to understand and build with Rastrum

descriptions.vision: Mission, problem statement, and why Oaxaca is the right place to start.
descriptions.features: What v1.0 ships today: identification cascade, observation logging, social and curation, data export, offline PWA, and privacy.
descriptions.roadmap: Six milestones from v0.1 MVP to v2.5 AI assistant over 30 months.
descriptions.tasks: Per-roadmap-item subtask breakdown with status, dependencies, and module references.
descriptions.market: Competitive analysis, market sizing, and the specific gap Rastrum fills.
descriptions.architecture: How the pieces fit together — system overview, identification cascade, offline-first sync, and the auth + token surface.
descriptions.indigenous: CARE principles, FPIC, Local Contexts Labels, and the CARI advisory council.
descriptions.funding: ~$400K in credits available now, grant pipeline, legal structure, and revenue model.
descriptions.contribute: How to contribute code, data, translations, expert validation, and PITs.
descriptions.faq: Common questions about installing, identification, audio, privacy, offline, and the API.
descriptions.privacy: What we collect, where it goes, and your right to delete — in plain language.
descriptions.terms: Acceptable use, per-observation licensing, and how we handle account suspensions.
descriptions.console: Privileged-actions surface for admin, moderator, and expert roles. Role model, audit log, and per-action runbooks.

import.title: Batch import photos
import.subtitle: Drop in many photos at once. We read EXIF GPS + datetime, you review per-row, then import.
import.drop_hint: or tap to choose files. JPEG/HEIC with embedded GPS work best.
import.bulk_set_hint: Apply to every included row. Leave a field blank to skip it.
import.imported_done: Imported {count} observation(s). They'll sync when you're online.
import.import_partial: Imported {ok} of {total}. {failed} failed — see console for details.
import.warn_no_ready: No rows are ready — every row needs a location.
import.tip_camera_trap: Camera trap deployment? Use the camera trap importer →

camera_trap.title: Camera trap import
camera_trap.subtitle: All photos in one deployment share a single GPS. We pull the timestamp per-photo from EXIF.
camera_trap.trap_location_hint: Lat/Lng in decimal degrees. Use the same coordinates the camera was deployed at.
camera_trap.use_my_location_failed: Couldn't read your GPS. Type the coordinates manually.
camera_trap.id_pipeline: MegaDetector v5a runs on-device to pre-filter empty / human / vehicle frames. Animal frames continue through the standard species cascade (PlantNet → Claude → Phi → EfficientNet).
camera_trap.id_pipeline_pending: Until the operator hosts the ONNX model behind PUBLIC_MEGADETECTOR_WEIGHTS_URL, the filter is unavailable and every photo runs through the species cascade.

tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.desc: Personal tokens to use Rastrum from AI agents, scripts, or external tools.
tokens.copy_now: Save this token now — you won't be able to see it again.
tokens.name_placeholder: e.g. My AI agent, Field laptop

recent.title: Recent observations
recent.subtitle: What's been spotted around you, lately.
recent.empty: No public observations yet. Be the first to share!

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.subtitle: Species and places you're following.
watchlist.empty: Add a species or place to follow it here.
watchlist.moved_note: Watchlist moved here from your profile — same data, public-facing home.
watchlist.signin_cta: Track species you care about. Sign in to start your watchlist.

species.title: Species
species.subtitle: Browse the corpus of species observed across Rastrum.
species.coming_soon: Coming in a future release. In the meantime, browse the map or your watchlist.
species.search_placeholder: Search by scientific or common name…
species.empty: No species match your search yet.
species.no_coordinates: No public observations with coordinates yet.

karma.expertise_empty: No specialization yet — start observing to build it.

validation.queue_empty: No observations waiting for validation. Nice work!
validation.cannot_vote_own: You can't validate your own observations
validation.tie_warning: Two suggestions are tied — a tiebreaker vote is needed.
validation.validate_signin_prompt: Sign in to suggest an identification
validation.no_taxon_match: No species found with that name. Make sure you're typing the full scientific name.
validation.dashboard_subtitle: Suggestions you've made and their impact.

validation.karma_microcopy_unavailable: Vote weighting will be visible after first save.

pokedex.title: Your Pokédex
pokedex.subtitle: Every species you've observed or correctly identified.
pokedex.subheading: Grouped by kingdom, with rarity tiers from your community's data.
pokedex.empty: No species yet — log your first observation to start the dex.

preferences.byo_keys_subtitle: Your own keys for paid identifiers — never sent to our servers, only forwarded per-request to the provider.

data.import_subtitle: Batch-import photos with GPS. Also supports camera trap deployments.
data.export_subtitle: Download your observations as Darwin Core CSV or DwC-A ZIP for GBIF.

developer.tokens_subtitle: Personal tokens (rst_*) for scripts, agents, and external integrations.
developer.expert_subtitle: Apply to become a validated expert and unlock the validation queue.

privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.subheading: Choose what visitors see on your public profile. Each row applies to one widget — no all-or-nothing toggle.
privacy.manage_in_tab_note: Manage privacy in the Privacy tab.
privacy.nuclear_confirm_body: This sets every facet to private and your profile to signed-in only. Other naturalists can still verify your account exists when reviewing community votes, but no widget will be visible.
privacy.private_profile_empty_body: The owner has not made any public information available. Try a different observer, or browse public observations.
privacy.not_found_body: We couldn't find an observer with that username. Check the spelling, or browse public observations to discover others.
privacy.signed_in_required_title: Sign in to view this profile
privacy.signed_in_required_body: The observer has limited their profile to signed-in viewers. Sign in with any account to continue.

console.overview_no_alerts: Nothing on fire — platform is healthy.
console.slideover_reason_placeholder: Why are you doing this? Logged to admin_audit.
console.slideover_audit_note: This action will be logged to admin_audit.
console.users_search_placeholder: Search by username or display name…
console.users_select_prompt: Select a user to view their roles and recent activity.
console.credentials_intro: Grant the researcher role to verified scientists. Researchers can read precise GPS coordinates on NOM-059 / CITES observations.
console.credentials_unlocks_note: Researcher unlocks precise coordinates for sensitive species. Verify identity before granting.
console.sync_intro: Recent client-side outbox failures grouped by error type. Use to triage stuck users.
console.sync_summary: {n} failures across {m} unique error groups in the last 7 days
console.sync_empty: No sync failures in the selected window. Healthy.
console.api_intro: External API quota burn-down. Refreshed nightly.
console.api_empty: No quota data yet. Cron 'plantnet-quota-daily' fills this nightly.
console.cron_intro: Schedule + last-run status of rastrum's nightly cron jobs.
console.obs_intro: Global view of all observations. Hide, obscure, or override license. All actions are logged to admin_audit.
console.obs_select_prompt: Select an observation to view details.
